message:
fix: presenter orphan detection, eliminate DiffViewport, O(1) diff lookups

- presenter.rs: treat continuation cells as orphans when cursor_x is
  unknown (None), preventing stale terminal content when render starts
  mid-wide-character
- mermaid_diff.rs: replace duplicated DiffViewport with pub(crate)
  Viewport from mermaid_render, eliminating code duplication and
  gaining the safer .clamp() in to_cell()
- mermaid_diff.rs: replace O(n) linear scans in render_diff node/edge
  overlay with HashMap index maps for O(1) lookup
- mermaid_diff.rs: remove unused LayoutRect import

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
